name: Approval required (high-privilege)
description: For high-privilege groups (Global Administrator role groups, tenant-root owner groups, Privileged Role Administrator): inherits the v1-parity baseline from 'default' (Expiration P1D/P365D/P365D, Enablement MFA + Justification on EndUser-Assignment + Admin-Eligibility) AND additionally requires an approval. Activation requires MFA + Justification AND an approval. Approvers = the definition row's Owners. Serial = first owner decides, escalates to the next after escalationHours; switch mode to 'Parallel' for any-one-of-the-owners-wins.
